question_text: A box with a weight of 100 N rests on the ground. If the contact area between the box and ground is 0.5 m², calculate the pressure exerted by the box.
explanation: Pressure = Force ÷ Area. Pressure = 100 N ÷ 0.5 m² = 200 Pa. The unit Pa (Pascal) or N/m² shows the force per unit area.
